Motion To Strirke Or To Tax Costs Of X-Defts The Family And Stephen Henderson
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS SAM MASSEY AND FRANK FREDERICKS' dba CITY TREES' Motion To Strike Or To Tax Costs Of Cross-Defendants The Family, INC. And Stephen Henderson is GRANTED IN PART. ATTORNEY'S FEE IS STRICKEN, FILING FEES REDUCED TO $80, EXPERT FEES STRICKEN AND DEPOSITION COSTS ALLOCATED AND REDUCED BY 1/2 TO $1,422 FOR A TOTAL COST RECOVERY AGAINST THIS DEFENDANT FOR $1,502. THE COURT ALSO NOTED FOR THE RECORD THE REASON BEHIND THE EXPERT FEES BEING STRICKEN. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Mtn To Strike And/Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brian Graziani, Esq. of Law Offices of Arnold Laub, 415-362-0101 for plaintiff and moving party Maggie Lehman
Steven Yuen, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, 415-788-1900 for defendant and opposing party Great Escape Fire Escape Services, Inc.

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF MAGGIE LEHMAN'S MOTION To Strike And/Or Tax Costs IS GRANTED AS TO EXPERT FEES BOTH BECAUSE THE OFFER WAS A TOKEN WITH NO CHANCE OF BEING ACCEPTED AND IN ANY EVENT, THE COURT WOULD EXCERCISE ITS DISCRETION NOT TO AWARD FEES UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES. DENIED AS TO MEDIATION COSTS WHICH THE COURT FINDS IS REASONABLY NECESSARY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189.301/PJB
